item.title: Twins vs Tannerite on the Farm
item.description: A rural work scene centered on equipment, land, and a controlled test of force on the property. The video follows the action as the twins take on Tannerite in a farm setting. Who comes out ahead?

media:content.media:title: Twins vs Tannerite on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A rural work scene centered on equipment, land, and a controlled test of force on the property. The video follows the action as the twins take on Tannerite in a farm setting. Who comes out ahead?

item.title: Twin Life on the Farm
item.description: A look at the everyday side of rural life and the small frustrations that come with being twins. Simple, relatable, and grounded in outdoor living. What stands out most about twin life?

media:content.media:title: Twin Life on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at the everyday side of rural life and the small frustrations that come with being twins. Simple, relatable, and grounded in outdoor living. What stands out most about twin life?

item.title: Twins vs. Hogs on the Farm
item.description: A farm scene where twins face off with hogs and discover what comes next. Rural work, livestock handling, and everyday agricultural life. What happens next on the farm?

media:content.media:title: Twins vs. Hogs on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A farm scene where twins face off with hogs and discover what comes next. Rural work, livestock handling, and everyday agricultural life. What happens next on the farm?

item.title: Twins Enjoying Time Outdoors
item.description: A simple outdoor moment shared by twins, capturing a relaxed take on time outside. What do you enjoy most about being outdoors?

media:content.media:title: Twins Enjoying Time Outdoors
media:content.media:description: A simple outdoor moment shared by twins, capturing a relaxed take on time outside. What do you enjoy most about being outdoors?

item.title: Twins Enjoying the Outdoors
item.description: A simple outdoor moment featuring twins and the take-it-outside spirit. Calm, light, and family-friendly—what do you notice first?

media:content.media:title: Twins Enjoying the Outdoors
media:content.media:description: A simple outdoor moment featuring twins and the take-it-outside spirit. Calm, light, and family-friendly—what do you notice first?

item.title: Every Shot Pays: Which Twin Shows Up?
item.description: A look at the work behind each shot and the twin that shows up for the job. Focused on practical equipment use and rural work settings. Which twin do you think appears?

media:content.media:title: Every Shot Pays: Which Twin Shows Up?
media:content.media:description: A look at the work behind each shot and the twin that shows up for the job. Focused on practical equipment use and rural work settings. Which twin do you think appears?

item.title: Wild Boar Hunting in Rural Outdoors
item.description: A rural hunting scene focused on wild boar and outdoor field activity. The video highlights the hunt in a natural setting. What stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: Wild Boar Hunting in Rural Outdoors
media:content.media:description: A rural hunting scene focused on wild boar and outdoor field activity. The video highlights the hunt in a natural setting. What stands out most to you?

item.title: Bullfrog Hunting: Catch, Clean, Cook
item.description: From the hunt to the kitchen, this outdoor adventure follows the full process of catching, cleaning, and preparing bullfrogs for a meal. What does it take to turn a successful hunt into dinner?

media:content.media:title: Bullfrog Hunting: Catch, Clean, Cook
media:content.media:description: From the hunt to the kitchen, this outdoor adventure follows the full process of catching, cleaning, and preparing bullfrogs for a meal. What does it take to turn a successful hunt into dinner?
